allow: PowerShell(git init; git add -A; git status --short | Select-Object -First 5; \(git status --short | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 素材 -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-1\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object LastWriteTime, @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\("$PWD\\素材\\",''\)}}, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; foreach \($z in @\('素材\\医生介绍.zip','素材\\项目介绍.zip'\)\) { $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("$PWD\\$z"\); Write-Output "==== $z \(entries: $\($zip.Entries.Count\)\) ===="; $zip.Entries | Select-Object -First 50 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("  " + $_.FullName + "  [" + [math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\) + " KB]"\) }; if \($zip.Entries.Count -gt 50\) { Write-Output \("  ... and " + \($zip.Entries.Count - 50\) + " more"\) }; $zip.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; foreach \($z in @\('医生介绍','项目介绍'\)\) { if \(-not \(Test-Path "素材\\$z"\)\) { [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\("$PWD\\素材\\$z.zip", "$PWD\\素材"\) } }; Get-ChildItem 素材 -Directory | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Expand-Archive -Path 素材\\医生介绍.zip -DestinationPath 素材 -Force; Expand-Archive -Path 素材\\项目介绍.zip -DestinationPath 素材 -Force; \(Get-ChildItem 素材\\医生介绍 -Recurse -File\).Count; \(Get-ChildItem 素材\\项目介绍 -Recurse -File\).Count)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 素材\\医生介绍 -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("$PWD\\素材\\医生介绍\\",''\) } | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 素材\\项目介绍 -Recurse -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("$PWD\\素材\\项目介绍\\",''\) } | Sort-Object)
Bash(curl -s -X POST localhost:3093/api/chat -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"双眼皮哪个医生好"}]}')

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('本地模式 segments:',j.segments.length,'| 图片:',j.segments.filter\(s=>s.startsWith\('!['\)\).map\(s=>s.match\(/!\\[\(.*?\)\\]/\)[1]\)\)}\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST localhost:3092/api/chat -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"双眼皮哪个医生好"}]}')
